manuscript_claim: Quality-gated FWI-to-RTM workflow for salt-model imaging.
novelty_position: Turns weak FWI recovery into a publishable diagnostic workflow by requiring model and RTM image gates before interpretation.
required_evidence: FWI misfit reduction, MAE/RMSE, edge MAE, gradient MAE, update-scale scan, and RTM before/after metrics.
claim_boundary: Supports conservative velocity-update screening, not high-resolution FWI velocity recovery.

manuscript_claim: Target-zone illumination, RTM-response, and FWI-update energy diagnostics.
novelty_position: Uses salt-top, salt-flank, and subsalt masks to evaluate whether updates and RTM response occur where interpretation needs them.
required_evidence: Source-receiver illumination, low-illumination fraction, RTM response, full update energy, damped update energy.
claim_boundary: Shows the subsalt target remains weakly illuminated and almost unupdated; it does not claim solved subsalt imaging.

manuscript_claim: Explicit separation of RTM image normalization and FWI gradient preconditioning.
novelty_position: Prevents the common over-claim that better RTM display normalization proves better FWI inversion.
required_evidence: Source-normalized, source-receiver-normalized, Laplacian, receiver illumination, correlation and low-illumination metrics.
claim_boundary: Supports imaging-condition interpretation; FWI preconditioning remains a separate ablation result.

manuscript_claim: Negative-result-aware local FWI ablation for illumination preconditioning.
novelty_position: Uses a controlled small salt window to show adaptive line search dominates the current lightweight illumination preconditioner.
required_evidence: Baseline, illumination-preconditioned, epsilon scan, max-update scan, line search, and adaptive extended line-search reductions.
claim_boundary: Positions illumination preconditioning as a limitation and future method target, not as the current main improvement.

manuscript_claim: JGE-oriented reproducible result packaging and readiness checking.
novelty_position: Converts scattered FWI/RTM outputs into journal-count-limited figures, tables, captions, alt text, and package checks.
required_evidence: Automated figure generation, method synthesis, reference audit, readiness report, and package manifest.
claim_boundary: Checks structure and evidence completeness; journal template formatting and final citation verification remain manual.
paper_section: Figure plan; Data and code availability
